articles.title: Baillie Gifford Trims Starbucks Stake in Q4
articles.summary: Baillie Gifford & Co. reduced its stake in Starbucks Corporation by 6.0% in the fourth quarter of 2025, selling 41,355 shares. This move suggests the major institutional investor sees limited near-term upside for Starbucks' stock, despite the company's global expansion. Baillie Gifford now holds 645,865 shares, valued at $54.4 million, representing 0.06% of Starbucks' outstanding stock.
